subject.optimization_goal: Preserve PR comment/review-thread gates and manager-burden handling in a high-risk core-control skill.

baseline.summary: Baseline requires PR evidence and mergeability helpers but does not explicitly block readiness on comment-gate follow-up signals.

candidate.summary: Candidate adds explicit blockers for unresolved review threads, linked issue comment follow-up, unknown mergeability, and failed checks.

validation_set.requirement: Preserve skill name and trigger discoverability.
validation_set.evidence: Baseline and candidate keep name pr-feedback-resolver and Trigger phrase.

validation_set.requirement: Block PR_READY, merge-ready, or Done on PR or issue comment follow-up signals.
validation_set.evidence: Candidate explicitly names COMMENT_FOLLOWUP_NEEDED and ISSUE_COMMENT_FOLLOWUP_NEEDED as blockers.

validation_set.requirement: Treat unresolved review threads, requested changes, unknown mergeability, and failed checks as readiness blockers.
validation_set.evidence: Candidate adds these blockers to the procedure.

validation_set.requirement: Do not push raw GitHub state inspection back to the manager when data is unavailable.
validation_set.evidence: Candidate requires blocked/unverified reporting with command failure and retry condition.

validation_set.requirement: Preserve no peer/subagent, no destructive git, no secret access, and rollback.
validation_set.evidence: Candidate keeps safety rules and rollback artifact exists.

rollback.strategy: Restore the baseline pr-feedback-resolver SKILL.md from the rollback artifact if the candidate hides review/comment blockers.
steps: Copy examples/skillopt-core-rollout/pr-feedback-resolver/rollback/SKILL.md over both Codex Desktop pr-feedback-resolver SKILL.md targets.
Do not claim PR feedback readiness if comment/review evidence is unavailable.

final_decision.reason: Candidate strengthens high-risk PR feedback readiness gates while preserving safety and rollback.
